name: validator
description: Spec directory validation: JSON schema conformance, content path resolution, DAG acyclicity, orphan detection, ID uniqueness.

requirements.title: JSON schema conformance
requirements.description: Validate project.json and module.json against their JSON Schemas. Report all violations, not just the first.

requirements.title: Content path resolution
requirements.description: All content paths in module.json resolve to existing markdown files relative to the module directory.

requirements.title: DAG acyclicity
requirements.description: Module dependencies (requires_module), requirement dependencies (depends_on), and component dependencies (uses) form directed acyclic graphs.

requirements.title: Orphan detection
requirements.description: Every requirement is referenced by at least one component (implements). Every component is referenced by at least one impl_section (describes).

requirements.title: ID uniqueness
requirements.description: All numeric IDs are unique within their containing array (requirements, components, impl_sections, data_flows, modules, milestones).

requirements.title: Cross-reference integrity
requirements.description: All cross-reference IDs point to existing nodes: implements → requirements, uses → components, describes → components, depends_on → requirements, requires_module → modules, groups → modules, preq_id → project requirements.

requirements.title: Structured error output
requirements.description: Exit 0 if valid. Exit 1 with structured JSON errors listing every violation found.

requirements.title: Fast validation
requirements.description: Validating a spec with 100 modules and 1000 nodes completes in under 1 second.

requirements.title: Self-validate
requirements.description: The validator can validate spex-machina's own spec directory, ensuring the tool's spec remains consistent as it evolves.

requirements.title: Module name consistency
requirements.description: Module names in project.json must match the corresponding module.json name field exactly. Lowercase convention enforced. Mismatches reported with both values and a suggested fix.

requirements.title: Test content path resolution
requirements.description: All test content paths (test_*.md) in module.json test_sections and project.json test_plan scenarios resolve to existing markdown files.

requirements.title: Test coverage checking
requirements.description: Every component must be described by at least one test_section. Report uncovered components as validation errors.

components.name: SchemaChecker
components.description: Validates project.json and module.json against embedded JSON Schemas using a JSON Schema validation library.

components.name: ContentResolver
components.description: Walks all content paths in module.json files and verifies the referenced markdown files exist.

components.name: DAGChecker
components.description: Builds dependency graphs from module, requirement, and component references, then checks for cycles.

components.name: OrphanDetector
components.description: Analyzes reference coverage to find requirements not implemented by any component and components not described by any impl_section.

components.name: IDValidator
components.description: Checks ID uniqueness within each array and validates all cross-reference targets exist.

components.name: ErrorReporter
components.description: Aggregates validation errors from all checkers and formats them as structured JSON for output.

components.name: ValidateCommand
components.description: CLI entry point for spex validate. Parses flags, wires all checkers through ErrorReporter, exits 0/1.

components.name: NameConsistencyChecker
components.description: Validates that module names in project.json match the corresponding module.json name field. Reports mismatches with both values and suggests fixes via case-insensitive comparison.

components.name: TestCoverageChecker
components.description: Checks that every component in each module is described by at least one test_section. Reports uncovered components as validation errors.

data_flows.name: Validation pipeline
data_flows.description: Spec directory flows through schema check, content check, DAG check, orphan check, and ID check. All errors are aggregated into a single structured report.
